flashcards.definition: Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design: green building rating system evaluating energy, water, materials, and indoor quality.
Urban planning approach promoting compact, walkable, mixed-use development that reduces sprawl and car dependence.
Cities are warmer than surrounding rural areas due to pavement, buildings, and reduced vegetation.
Vegetation-based systems (green roofs, rain gardens, bioswales, urban forests) managing stormwater and reducing heat.
Building design using sun orientation, thermal mass, and natural ventilation to heat/cool without mechanical systems.
